description: The hidden `--capture-profile` flag captures end-to-end profiling traces spanning the CLI, AppHost (including lifecycle hooks, DCP operations, and resource creation), TypeScript AppHost managed server, and DCP startup scopes. Profiling spans are also instrumented for `aspire add`, covering package search, selection, and installation. A dedicated OTLP provider exports all spans to a dashboard archive (`traces/profile.json`), making it possible to diagnose startup and operation bottlenecks across the entire stack.
name: CLI startup self-profiling with trace export
